POULTRY MAINS - PAGE 47

ROASTED CHICKEN WITH ROOT VEGET-
ABLES

Ingredients:
1 whole chicken (4-5 pounds), pat-
ted dry
3 tablespoons olive oil
Salt and fresh ground pepper
2 sprigs fresh rosem-
ary
3 sprigs fresh thyme
6 medium potatoes, cut into 1-inch
cubes
4 large carrots, cut into 1-inch pie-
ces
3 parsnips, cut into 1-inch pie-
ces
8 pearl onions, peeled
4 cloves garlic, sm-
ashed
1 cup chicken broth

Method:
Preheat oven to 425°F. Rub the chicken with 2 tablespoons olive oil, salt,
and pepper. Stuff the cavity with rosemary and thyme.

In a large roasting pan, toss the potatoes, carrots, parsnips, onions, and
garlic with remaining olive oil, salt, and pepper. Arrange around the chicken
in the pan. Pour broth around vegetables.

456 ◻ Roast for 1 hour 15 minutes to 1 hour 30 minutes, until the internal
temperature reaches 165°F at the thickest part of the thigh. The vegetables
should be golden and tender.

Rest the chicken for 10 minutes before carving. Serve with pan jui-
ces drizzled over the vegetables.

Serves 4-6.

*See also: Herb-Roasted Chicken (Page 52)
